narrative:
Burton Twp township has 1,773 registered voters, with 53.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 35.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 25.1 percentage points.
